title: Reservation.position is computed but never read
evidence: catalog/loans.py:61-63 computes position=len(current_reservations)+1 and stores it on Reservation; FIFO ordering in catalog/store.py:32-33 relies on list append order, and list_reservations (catalog/loans.py:74-77) never reads .position
suggestion: Drop the position field (or actually use it for ordering) — vestigial state can drift from the real FIFO order
